hover.$description: NEUTRAL-ONLY hover background for neutral/transparent surfaces (list rows, menu items, ghost/outline controls). NOT intent-aware — a brand/intent surface that uses this reads gray on hover instead of its intent-dark. Intent surfaces must use semantic.color.action.background.<intent>.hover.

active.$description: NEUTRAL-ONLY active/pressed background for neutral/transparent surfaces. NOT intent-aware. Intent surfaces use semantic.color.action.background.<intent>.active.

selected.$description: Selection highlight background (neutral selection affordance, e.g. selected list row). Not an intent surface color.

disabled.$description: NEUTRAL disabled background, shared across intents (disabled controls are conventionally neutral). Canonical disabled-bg home; intent variants intentionally fall back here rather than carrying per-intent disabled tokens.
